name: Pokemon Infinite Fusion
description: A fan game that allows players to fuse any two Pokémon together, creating thousands of unique combinations with custom sprites and mechanics.

name: Pokemon Prisme
description: A classic-style Pokémon ROM hack featuring a brand new region, original story, new mechanics, and many custom features built on the Pokémon Crystal engine.

name: PokéPath TD
description: A Pokémon-themed tower defense game where players strategically place Pokémon to defend paths against waves of incoming enemies.
